case_title: PETER P. NAVARREZ VS. ORLANDO OMAR PREZA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-28-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-28-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. REQUEST FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE GIVEN TO DEFENDANT IN OPEN COURT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ADDITIONAL EXHIBITS INFORMATION AS REQUESTED BY COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT RECEIVED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NAVARREZ, PETER P. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PREZA, ORLANDO OMAR PLAINTIFF FAILED TO INSPECT THE CAR, OR UNDERTAKE ANY REASONABLE INQUIRY CONCERNING THE VEHICLE BEFORE PURCHASE, AND THEREFORE ACCEPTED THE CAR "AS-IS". STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $49.83) SERVED APR-26-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PREZA, ORLANDO OMAR
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED SEP-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (FEE FOR SERVICE:$30.00) FILED BY PLAINTIFF NAVARREZ, PETER P. AS TO DEFENDANT PREZA, ORLANDO OMAR
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-28-2010 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY NAVARREZ, PETER P. AS TO DEFENDANT PREZA, ORLANDO OMAR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-28-2010 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
